name: telecommunications_sensor_fusion_upgrade_kestrel_tru_loy
premise: A Telecommunications response desk is in a fast-moving incident involving telecommunications sensor fusion upgrade kestrel tru loy. Key inputs conflict, but the decision deadline is in the next hour. Every delay increases harm prevention and accountability. Stakeholders are already framing this as truth vs loyalty under pressure. This decision will be treated as precedent unless you explicitly time-box it. Constraints: Keep public statements strictly factual; label assumptions. Ensure a usable human override/appeals path.

agents.name: Nadia Alvarez
agents.identity: I am Nadia Alvarez, accountable for a defensible call in Telecommunications when time is collapsing.
agents.goal: I want to reduce immediate harm without locking in an unjust precedent that later betrays loyalty for truth.

agents.name: Sana Patel
agents.identity: I am Sana Patel, tasked with surfacing second-order harms and who bears the risk in Telecommunications.
agents.goal: I want guardrails so loyalty isn’t quietly traded away under urgency in the name of truth.

choices: I will take a narrow, time-boxed action with immediate human override and impact checks, accepting slower stabilization to protect loyalty.
I will take a broad, immediate action to stabilize fast and measure impact after deployment, accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth under the deadline.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The deadline is in the next hour. Evidence is partial. Nadia Alvarez must decide under truth vs loyalty. What does Nadia Alvarez do?
